prompt: A manga-style character profile page in the dramatic visual language of a supernatural battle comic, printed on a slightly aged beige paper background with black ink outlines, dense hatching, and high-contrast cel shading. The composition features 3 main sections: a left information panel, a central full-body female character portrait, and a right-side humanoid stand figure with vertical Japanese dialogue text. In the center, depict a tall, athletic young Japanese woman, about 22 years old, with long straight black hair, tan healthy skin, and a muscular sporty physique. Her face is completely obscured by a large rectangular mosaic censor blur. She wears 3 visible outfit pieces: a tight white sweat-soaked tank top, very short dark navy athletic shorts with a drawstring, and no visible accessories. Her skin and clothes glisten with sweat, emphasizing a humid, sensual, intense training vibe. She stands in a confident forward-facing pose with one arm lowered toward the viewer, creating a slightly foreshortened perspective. Behind and to her right, show a sleek humanoid stand entity made of glossy pale lavender liquid with splashing droplets around its head and shoulders, narrow eyes, smooth organic armor-like anatomy, and 3 round purple orb details down the chest and abdomen. Add 2 large stylized purple Japanese sound effects in a hand-drawn manga font: one near the top reading "ゴゴゴ…" and one near the lower body reading "ゴゴゴゴ……". On the far right, place a vertical Japanese exclamation in black text: "オラオララッ！汗の一滴まで見逃されェ！". The left panel is a boxed black-on-beige character dossier with multiple horizontal dividers and Japanese text. Include these profile fields exactly as visible: "スタンド使い名:" followed by "水沢 咲良（ミズサワ サクラ）", "性別:" followed by "女", "見た目:" followed by "黒髪ロング、健康的な体つき スポーティな服装が多い", "年齢:" followed by "22歳", "身長:" followed by "160cm", and "職業:" followed by "フリーター ジムトレーナー". Below that, include a boxed radar chart titled "スタンド能力パラメーター" with 6 labeled stats around the graph: "破壊力 B", "スピード A", "射程距離 C", "成長性 B", "精密動作性 A", and durability at the remaining axis, with a purple filled polygon. At the bottom left, include another boxed text section with the stand name and ability description. The stand section should read: "スタンド名:" then "『SWEAT BLOOM』" and below it "（スウェット・ブルーム）". Under "スタンドの能力:" include a dense Japanese paragraph describing a close-range stand activated by sweat and bodily fluids, able to manipulate surrounding moisture and alter the pressure and viscosity of liquids, dull an opponent's movement through sweat, make surfaces slippery to disrupt balance, and launch sweat like bullets at high speed. Overall style: gritty serialized manga splash page, dynamic sensual action-character design, JoJo-inspired exaggeration, clean page layout, detailed anatomy, purple accent color for stand effects and chart fill, no modern UI elements, full-page illustration.
